rulings.Case Title: URANIA GIANNAKARAS VS. CHRISTIAN SONNTAG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Enforce Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2018 line 1. PETITIONER URANIA GIANNAKARAS' Motion To Enforce Settlement DENIED. This Court lacks jurisdiction to enforce the settlement. Sayta v. Chu (2017) 17 Cal.App.5th 960. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS SINKIEWICZ ET AL VS. SKYLINE 83 BATAVIA INVESTORS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Altenative Summary Adjudication/ Notice
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT SKYLINE 83 BATAVIA INVESTORS, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Altenative Summary Adjudication OFF CALENDAR, duplicate entry. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS SINKIEWICZ ET AL VS. SKYLINE 83 BATAVIA INVESTORS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion For Summary Judgment Of Richard Merryman
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT RICHARD MERRYMAN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED. Plaintiff concedes that "Motion for Summary Adjudication on all causes of action previously alleged in the complaint" should be granted (Opposition 11:26). Hearing Required to address why leave to amend to allege a cause of action under Illinois Consumer Fraud Act should be granted and to address whether such cause of action is barred by SOL. If parties intend to rely on Illinois law in their oral argument (re: elements, SOL) parties to provide copies of the statutes, cases, jury instructions, etc. to the Court and the opposing side by no later than 9:00 a.m. on November 21, 2018. Plaintiff to provide a copy of the proposed Amended Complaint to the Court and opposing side no later than 9:00 a.m. on November 21, 2018.

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS SINKIEWICZ ET AL VS. SKYLINE 83 BATAVIA INVESTORS, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Joinder In Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2018 line 2. DEFENDANT SKYLINE 83 BATAVIA INVESTORS, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Joinder In Motion For Summary Judgment, Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication GRANTED. Plaintiff concedes that "Motion for Summary Adjudication on all causes of action previously alleged in the complaint" should be granted (Opposition 11:26). Hearing Required to address why leave to amend to allege a cause of action under Illinois Consumer Fraud Act should be granted and to address whether such cause of action is barred by SOL. If parties intend to rely on Illinois law in their oral argument (re: elements, SOL) parties to provide copies of the statutes, cases, jury instructions, etc. to the Court and the opposing side by no later than 9:00 a.m. on November 21, 2018. Plaintiff to provide a copy of the proposed Amended Complaint to the Court and opposing side no later than 9:00 a.m. on November 21, 2018. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: STEVE WANG ET AL VS. CITADEL RE & INVESTMENTS LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents And Interrogatories
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2018 line 3. PLAINTIFFs STEVE WANG and JENNY YU's Motion To Compel Responses To Demand For Production Of Documents And Interrogatories OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005. (November 12, 2018 was a Court holiday). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARIE TATMAN VS. ELIJAH WHITE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Motion And Defendant Carrol Anne Whites Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT CARROL WHITE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Hearing Required to address when the Statute of Limitations began running, August 20, 2012 or October 2014. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAMIEN QUINN VS. BELLROSE, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2018 line 5. PLAINTIFF DAMIEN QUINN's Motion For Protective Order DENIED. Parties to agree on a deposition date. If parties cannot agree, deposition is to take place the week of November 26, 2018 on a date designated by the deposing party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OLUSOJI FANOIKI VS. 1081-1087 MISSISSIPPI STREET ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities Insupport Of Application For Preliminary Injunction To Prohibit Foreclosure And Sale; Request For Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2018 line 6. PLAINTIFF OLUSOJI FANOIKI's Notice And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In support Of Application For Preliminary Injunction To Prohibit Foreclosure And Sale; Request For Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction OFF CALENDAR. Motion for Preliminary Injunction was improperly calendared without first obtaining an OSC. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that OSC procedure is not mandatory. To the extent Plaintiff is seeking OSC by this motion, the request is moot as Defendants have now appeared in the action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 812 GUERRERO LLC VS. MATTHEW EVAN WOLKENSTEIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANTs MATTHEW WOLKENSTEIN and GABRIELLE MOSKOWITZ' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend. The Notice is fatally defective as Plaintiff failed to comply with the lease. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DELWIN M. BLACKMAN III VS. TAMARA CARLIN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2018 line 8. PLAINTIFF DELWIN BLACKMAN's Motion To Continue Trial Granted. Contiuned to December 3, 2018. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BALMORAL RESIDENCES, LLC VS. RIGOBERTO MORENO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: (Amended) Application And Ntc Of Application And Hearing For Order To Quash Exparte Writ Of Possession ***Filed At Insistence Of Litigant***
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2018 line 9. DEFENDANT RIGOBERTO MORENO's (Amended) Application And Hearing For Order To Quash Ex Parte Writ Of Possession ***Filed At Insistence Of Litigant*** DENIED. Re-notice of this motion for December 17, 2018 is ordered off calendar. This motion was advanced from November 28, 2018. In contravention of the Court's order, Defendant re-noticed it for a later date without leave of Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BALMORAL RESIDENCES, LLC VS. RIGOBERTO MORENO ET AL

rulings.Case Title: JEAN HOLSTEN VS. JOAN HOLSTEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 21, 2018 line 10. DEFENDANT JOAN HOLSTEN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. The issue of tenancy vs. license is factual and cannot be addressed on a demurrer. Standing is sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)
